'''Dielo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was nearing middle age and served as [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]]'s [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] during the first years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She had [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and an appearance that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] found striking.<ref name="The Hutt Gambit" />
